h7c501c3bgd91dg44d9g9d64ga0a304171f63: You won't get any further this way, friend. Road's blocked up ahead.
h2e729f9eg82c2g4dcdgbaffg138b2da68fed: Thanks for letting me know - what's causing the blockage?
hf2a173e9g292dg4a0eg8d8fg7873879c07d4: Rockfall in the ravine. Perfect spot for an ambush.
h163cb90eg16c8g4936ga2a3g079a5efef186: And there's plenty of creatures around here looking to spring an ambush, so you'd best move on or head inside.
hfbfd9942g3cedg4588g924dg428494951ca0: Blocked to you maybe. What's the issue?
h7960c009g0456g4df7g9023g6139db9e8088: Are the dead gnolls your handiwork?
h0d4c800ag34dbg44e0gb497gf1924a5ae935: I killed the biggest, ugliest one myself. My friends inside took care of the rest.
h9c3ca4d6geba3g41bdg8512g848105440e6c: Your friends must be quite formidable.
h257900b7gbedag469bg9d2ag3be1cd2d01a1: We're paladins, fighting for Tyr's justice. Trying to keep the road safe for the refugees passing through.
hda9c5611ga314g4072gabb5g63753b0ffc96: You should head inside and meet the others.
hb233b2c5g0f32g4a54g97a1g0c700db26d32: You said the road was blocked - what happened?
h54aa514dg8bf6g47b9g81b7g9badad459126: A difficult task - but a worthy one.
h3560a467gc025g4789gaefbgb9f22c9f84ac: Aye? You should talk to Anders inside - you may be able to help us.
h67d81ba7gccf6g4838g9e21gef385cf0ae6f: Given what I've seen out here, you're not doing a very good job.
h4b58ba1ag4dd0g4509ga3dfg286eca77bf31: Well met. I too fight in Tyr's name.
h35fd9ed1gd7bag4628gb00ag2483aa2e3235: Truth and justice be with you, brother. I am a cleric of Tyr.
h380c7226gf7a8g4ba7g9707g6fb190eb8f39: Do you and your friends often hunt gnolls?
h240ff912g4511g4f86g9064g2661b34f2878: Get inside if you're sticking around - you'll only attract the wrong kind of attention out here.
